response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and leadership in diverse technical environments, but lacks the depth of experience in C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure required for this role. Her background in mentoring, open-source contributions, and technical leadership is promising, though not directly aligned with the core requirements.
strengths: Proven technical leadership and mentoring experience across multiple roles and projects.
Diverse technical background with contributions to open-source platforms and developer tooling.
Strong problem-solving skills and experience with distributed systems and infrastructure.
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience, with minimal mention of C++ in recent roles.
Limited direct experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale infrastructure as specified in the job description.
Most recent work focuses on full-stack development (TypeScript/Node.js) rather than the specialized cloud compute technologies required.
